headline: Is It Time To Reassess UnitedHealth Group (UNH) After This Year’s Sharp Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether UnitedHealth Group at around US$314 per share is attractively priced or still carrying a premium, you are not alone. The stock has returned 2.6% over the last 7 days and 10.0% over the last 30 days, although the year to date return is a 6.6% decline and the 1 year return is a 44.8% decline. Recent headlines have focused on UnitedHealth Group's role in the wider US healthcare system and ongoing attention on health insurance, cost management and regulatory...

headline: UnitedHealth Q1 Earnings Preview: Can it Dodge MA Pressure for a Beat?
summary: UNH heads into Q1 2026 earnings with costs rising and membership slipping, but growing services revenue and steady insurance operating income could keep a beat alive.

headline: Gear Up for UnitedHealth (UNH) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of UnitedHealth (UNH) for the quarter ended March 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.
